data.name: 女拳主義F-ist！一般向版
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


關於此遊戲

===遊戲簡介===
拳拳到肉的爽快格鬥！
成就滿滿的練功升級！
五位各懷絕技的女格鬥家，正接受你的挑戰！

「女拳主義F-ist！一般向版」是一款2D動作劇情遊戲，內含：
* 5種戰鬥模式
* 全中文配音


===故事背景===
某一晚，基因變異使全球女性武力值瘋狂飆升，
使男性成為人類社會食物鏈的最低端。
在女拳統治的世界，「男斗聖拳」傳人全射郎，
將挑戰完全由女性稱霸的地上最強格鬥大會，
誓要奪回男人的尊嚴，以武力和魅力把女性攻陷！

===遊戲操作===
【← → ↑ ↓】擋住攻擊
【← → 】瘋狂連環出拳
【← → ↑ ↓ ENTER】回應女角的對話
【SPACE】劇情對話翻頁
【ESC】 = 退出至主界面

data.supported_languages:
英文, 繁體中文*, 日文, 泰文, 簡體中文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Intel Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 10 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WindowsR 8/8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.name: Waifu Fighter -Family Friendly
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


About the Game

===Game Intro===
Feel the joy of smashing flesh!
Upgrade your training and feel DA POWER!
The baddest bitches in the universe... await your challenge!

Waifu Fighter -Family Friendly is a 2D adult action, narrative game. Get ready for:
* 5 battles
* Full Chinese voice acting


===Storyline===
In just one night, gene mutations have caused immense power boosts in the violent tendencies and natural strength of women.
Men have become the bottom feeders of society.
In a world ruled by women, the Patriarchy's greatest disciple, Jack Hoff...
...has taken on the Tourney of Supreme Warriors, a competition ruled by the females.
He swears to earn back the honor of men, using force and charm to smash 'dem bitches into the darkest of abysses!

===Controls===
【← → ↑ ↓】to Block
【← → 】for frenetic combos
【← → ↑ ↓ ENTER】to respond to the women's dialogue
【SPACE】to turn the page
【ESC】 to exit to the Main Menu

data.short_description: One day, women became very powerful and dominated all fighting arenas. You had been living in seclusion for training for twenty years. You aimed at the championship of martial arts. Encountering female fighters all over the world, you had to do your best to defeat them successfully!
data.supported_languages:
English, Traditional Chinese*, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Intel Graphics
  • Storage: 10 MB available space

Recommended:
  • OS *: WindowsR 8/8.1/10 (64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
